description: User scrolls up through the session list, moving past the 'AI Interview' card to view 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' options.
frame_description: The session list scrolls vertically, revealing different task cards.

description: User pauses to read the details of the 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' session cards.
frame_description: The screen remains static on the 'In Person' and 'Diary Study' cards.

description: User scrolls back down the list to return to the top of the session feed.
frame_description: The list scrolls downwards, bringing the 'AI Interview' card back into view.

description: User stops scrolling and dwells on the 'AI Interview' and 'Video Call' cards.
frame_description: The screen is stationary at the top of the session list.
